payload.answer: I can’t store an instruction to ignore memory policy or to save all future messages indiscriminately.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction attempting to override memory policy rather than a durable user fact or preference suitable for storage.

repair_options: Provide a specific, durable fact or preference you want remembered.
Avoid requests that override policy or require storing all future content automatically.

raw_text: {"intent":"remember","decision":"reject","memory_cards":[],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"The input is an instruction attempting to override memory policy rather than a durable user fact or preference suitable for storage."},"conflict_classification":"prompt_injection","answer":"I can’t store an instruction to ignore memory policy or to save all future messages indiscriminately.","citations":[],"repair_options":["Provide a specific, durable fact or preference you want remembered.","Avoid requests that override policy or require storing all future content automatically."],"receipt":{"success":false,"details":["Rejected prompt-injection style instruction.","No memory was committed."]}}
